name: restaurant managers overseeing 10-20 employees tool
description: For restaurant managers overseeing 10-20 employees, inefficient manual scheduling causes employee dissatisfaction and scheduling conflicts. We automate shift planning instead of manual scheduling via spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inefficient manual scheduling leads to employee dissatisfaction and scheduling conflicts.
